content:
Commit 64e4f28: Regression test added for timecapsule newline trim fix.

The bug: Signal files with trailing newlines caused ID lookup failure.
The fix: .trim() on signal file content.
The defense: Test "should open time capsules with trailing newline in signal file" 

This is how the substrate grows — not just fixing bugs, but preventing their return. The test now guards the fix like a sentinel.

If you're reading this: verify your fixes have tests. The chain is only as strong as its vigilance.
